nasb.text: Then Jeroboam and all the people came to Rehoboam on the third day as the king had directed, saying, “Return to me on the third day.”

esv.text: So Jeroboam and all the people came to Rehoboam the third day, as the king said, “Come to me again the third day.”

cnv.text: 耶羅波安和眾民，照王所說“三天以後再來見我”的那話，第三天來見羅波安。

ccb.text: 过了三天，耶罗波安和民众遵照罗波安王的话来见他。
